THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAERINA PERLITA C. CROSS-CLAIM DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $520.89 FILED BY SANTOS ANGELINA VALLE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MAERINA PERLITA C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

TRIAL RESET TO OCT-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ANGELINA SANTOS RECEIVED.
